author: Rajat Nai
description: Export Obsidian canvas files with all connected notes, assets, and structure into a zip. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Rajat Nai
manifest.description: Export canvas files with all connected notes, assets, and structure into a zip.
manifest.name: Canvas Bundle

name: Canvas Bundle

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Replace jsZip with fflate for light weight and remove obfuscation which was created by jsZip.
- Save zip beside main canvas.
- Ask for confirmation dialog while overwrite zip.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rajatnai49/obsidian-canvas-bundler/compare/0.0.2...0.0.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Initial release of Canvas Bundle**

- Export the active canvas into a portable zip file. 
- Include linked notes, embedded files, attachments, and group background assets. 
- Rewrite internal canvas and note links so the exported bundle stays connected. 
- Avoid overwriting existing exports by creating numbered zip filenames when needed.
